title: Pestshield Slug And Snail Killer Pellets 300 gm
features: PESTSHIELD GARDEN SLUG & SNAIL KILLER READY TO USE BAIT: Simply open and distribute the small blue pellets to areas where slugs and snails appear in and around the garden. Apply to borders, plant pots, around growing tunnels or allotments. Also suitable to place into any existing slug and snail bait traps in the garden.

ORGANIC GARDENING: Pestshield Slug & Snail Killer pellets, Certified by Organic Gardeners and Growers. Perfect for use in allotments and Organic growing areas. Children and pets need not be excluded from treated areas.

SHOWERPROOF BAIT: Pestshield Slug & Snail Killer pellets are long lasting, remain active through 10 days of showerpoof, light rain. Following excessive rainfall, you may be required to re-apply to reduce the damage caused by slugs and snails.
READY TO USE, MESS FREE SLUG & SNAIL KILLER: After application, Slugs and snails eat the pellets, then continue to move, disappearing underground, leaving no unsightly mess or slime trails
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: Use Pesticides Safely. Always Read the label. Store in a cool, dry area out of the reach of children. 300gm Ready To Use Slug & Snail Killer Bait.
description: Product Description Pestshield Slug & Snail Killer pellets, Certified by Organic Gardeners and Growers. Perfect for use in allotments and Organic growing areas. Children and pets need not be excluded from treated areas. Simply open and distribute the small blue pellets to areas where slugs and snails appear in and around the garden. Apply to borders, plant pots, around growing tunnels or allotments. Also suitable to place into any existing slug and snail bait traps in the garden. Pestshield Slug & Snail Killer pellets are long lasting, remain active through 10 days of showerpoof, light rain. Following excessive rainfall , you may be required to re-apply to reduce the damage caused by slugs and snails. After application, Slugs and snails eat the pellets, then continue to move, disappearing underground, leaving no unsightly mess or slime trails. Use Pesticides Safely. Always Read the label. Store in a cool, dry area out of the reach of children. 300gm Ready To Use Slug & Snail Killer Bait. Safety Warning USE AS DIRECTED TO PROTECT PETS AND CHILDREN. KEEP AWAY FROM TREATED AREA. SEE FULL INSTRUCTIONS ON PACKAGING. NOT SAFE FOR CONSUMPTION.
